_comment: WC2026 Group J, Matchday 2 (Levi's Stadium, SF Bay Area). MD1: both lost (Algeria 0-3 Argentina; Jordan 1-3 Austria) -> both 0 points, must-win. Odds Jordan +500 (6.00) / Draw +320 (4.20) / Algeria -185 (1.541). Opta Algeria 60.7%. Calibrated in line with the market: Algeria the quality side (Mahrez/Gouiri/Aouar), Jordan competitive underdog.

meta.venue: Levi's Stadium, San Francisco Bay Area (USA)
meta.stakes: Both lost MD1 and are on 0 points: a must-win for both to stay alive. Algeria the favorite on quality; Jordan competitive (scored their historic first WC goal vs Austria).

home.name: Jordan
notes: Organized, competitive underdog; scored their first-ever WC goal (Olwan) vs Austria. attack 0.75 (Al-Tamari the main threat).
Must win, will go for it -> open-ish match (rho -0.05).

away.name: Algeria
notes: Quality side: Mahrez, Gouiri, Aouar, Chaibi, Amoura. Lost 0-3 to Argentina (elite). attack 1.30.
Calibrated in line with the market (~61%): don't underrate the favorite.
Decent defense -> low Jordan lambda, defense 0.87.

cards._referee: Slavko Vincic (Slovenia), CONFIRMED. Top UEFA referee, career ~4.1 YC/match (more lenient in elite UEFA, ~2.4 recent CL). International discount, neutral bump -> moderate cards (~3.5).
